limitation: Point-detection radar simulation, not raw RF/IQ
impact: Detection-level realism only; no waveform, sidelobe, or receiver effects
mitigation_or_future_work: A raw RF/range-Doppler intensity simulation would test the detector itself

limitation: Pseudo range-Doppler figures are point-detection scatter plots
impact: They must not be read as radar intensity maps
mitigation_or_future_work: Generate true RD heatmaps only if gridded intensity data is simulated

limitation: Synthetic relocation of trajectories near the radar
impact: Motion shape is real ADS-B; radar geometry/engagement is synthetic
mitigation_or_future_work: Deploy against a real radar site with co-located ADS-B truth

impact: Conclusions are scoped to light general-aviation motion
mitigation_or_future_work: Extend to rotorcraft, UAS, and manoeuvring military profiles

impact: Sequence methods have ~0 windowable false tracks there; reduction is undefined
mitigation_or_future_work: Compare only at -5/0/3/6 dB, or use a length-matched denominator

limitation: Track-purity calibration uses truth labels to SELECT calibration tracks
impact: The score itself never sees labels, but calibration-set selection does
mitigation_or_future_work: Use a purity proxy (e.g. self-consistency) to make calibration fully unsupervised

limitation: Learned-method evidence is on simulated detections, not real radar returns
impact: Absolute numbers will not transfer directly to a fielded radar
mitigation_or_future_work: Validate on recorded radar detections with ADS-B truth

limitation: Diffusion and VAE were not tuned exhaustively
impact: Their negative results are for the configurations tested, not the families
mitigation_or_future_work: A scoped sweep could revisit them if a specific gap emerges

impact: Throughput and latency for an operational system are unmeasured
mitigation_or_future_work: A deployment-style runtime and operating-point study
